main.description: A gated content pointer. References an encrypted piece of content on IPFS with a safe public preview.

contentCid.description: IPFS hash of the actual content (encrypted; requires authorization to access).

blurHash.description: BlurHash representation of the content for safe public low-fidelity previews.

gatekeeperDid.description: DID of the Gatekeeper service the client must contact to obtain a Submarined JWT URL.
